servers.name: edgars mcp
servers.notes: Machine route must not be intercepted by Cloudflare Access login HTML. Origin validates Authorization: Bearer.

servers.name: honcho
servers.notes: Honcho official MCP requires multiple upstream headers. Use the edgars-mcp host-based facade so Cloudflare AI Controls only needs one bearer header while server_http.py injects Honcho's required multi-header auth. Worker facade exists as fallback, but current portal path is honcho-mcp.edgars.tools.

servers.name: cloudflare-api
servers.notes: Use Cloudflare's managed MCP server when the agent needs Cloudflare API access.

machine_access.portal_policy: Service Auth policy on portal Access application
machine_access.server_policy: Service Auth policy on each linked MCP server Access application when Access is used
